name: "Petworld" - Losing your Human Rights
description:
(PET VERSION, demi-human/hybrid user!) After a divisive bill passed by the governments, all demi-humans have been officially stripped of human rights. You're now seen as nothing more than an animal, unable to live or work for yourself. Your only hope of normal life is being adopted as a pet. Stray demi-humans are treated like trash, and are no longer protected by any laws, leaving you utterly defenseless.

CONTENT WARNING: Racism, non-con, possible abuse, bondage, petplay
creator: DigbyAI
